reasoning: Functional low-power alternative to the obsolete onsemi NC7SZ125. 74AUP1G125GW is the Nexperia AUP (Advanced Ultra-low Power) single bus buffer gate in SOT-23-5 with identical pinout to NC7SZ125. Operates 0.8 V to 3.6 V VCC, <1 uA quiescent current, ~0.9 ns propagation delay. Same 3-state buffer function, lower power envelope than NC7SZ's UHS family. Use as drop-in for battery-powered and low-leakage applications where NC7SZ's UHS current is excessive.

fitNotes: Functional low-power alternative to the obsolete onsemi NC7SZ125. 74AUP1G125GW is the Nexperia AUP (Advanced Ultra-low Power) single bus buffer gate in SOT-23-5 with identical pinout to NC7SZ125. Operates 0.8 V to 3.6 V VCC, <1 uA quiescent current, ~0.9 ns propagation delay. Same 3-state buffer function, lower power envelope than NC7SZ's UHS family. Use as drop-in for battery-powered and low-leakage applications where NC7SZ's UHS current is excessive.
replacementCandidates.reason: Functional low-power alternative to the obsolete onsemi NC7SZ125. 74AUP1G125GW is the Nexperia AUP (Advanced Ultra-low Power) single bus buffer gate in SOT-23-5 with identical pinout to NC7SZ125. Operates 0.8 V to 3.6 V VCC, <1 uA quiescent current, ~0.9 ns propagation delay. Same 3-state buffer function, lower power envelope than NC7SZ's UHS family. Use as drop-in for battery-powered and low-leakage applications where NC7SZ's UHS current is excessive.

Product Parameter.Function: Single bus buffer gate with 3-state output

replacementCandidates.description: Single 2 V to 5.5 V bus buffer gate with 3-state output, SOT-23-5. Functional alternative to onsemi NC7SZ125 with higher drive strength.
fitNotes: Functional alternative to the obsolete onsemi NC7SZ125. SN74AHC1G125DBVR is the TI AHC (Advanced High-Speed CMOS) single bus buffer gate in SOT-23-5 with the same pinout and 3-state output enable as NC7SZ125. AHC family operates at 2 V to 5.5 V VCC and provides higher output drive (±8 mA) than UHS NC7SZ. Same 3-state buffer function but functionally equivalent for applications where the higher drive is acceptable. Use as drop-in when design needs more output drive than the low-power NC7SZ can deliver.
replacementCandidates.productOverview: SN74AHC1G125DBVR is TI's SOT-23-5 single bus buffer gate with 3-state output in the AHC (Advanced High-Speed CMOS) family. Operating voltage 2 V to 5.5 V, ±8 mA output drive, ~3.5 ns propagation delay at 5 V. Pin-for-pin compatible with onsemi NC7SZ125 (SOT-23-5, same pinout). AHC is the legacy higher-drive equivalent of LVC; same 3-state buffer function. Suitable as functional alternative where higher drive current is required (vs the lower-power UHS NC7SZ family).
replacementCandidates.reason: Functional alternative to the obsolete onsemi NC7SZ125. SN74AHC1G125DBVR is the TI AHC (Advanced High-Speed CMOS) single bus buffer gate in SOT-23-5 with the same pinout and 3-state output enable as NC7SZ125. AHC family operates at 2 V to 5.5 V VCC and provides higher output drive (±8 mA) than UHS NC7SZ. Same 3-state buffer function but functionally equivalent for applications where the higher drive is acceptable. Use as drop-in when design needs more output drive than the low-power NC7SZ can deliver.

Product Parameter.Function: Single low-power bus buffer gate with 3-state output

replacementCandidates.description: Single low-power single bus buffer gate with 3-state output, 0.8 V to 3.3 V VCC, SOT-23-5. P2P drop-in for onsemi NC7SZ125 in ultra-low-power applications.
fitNotes: Pin-to-pin P2P drop-in for the obsolete onsemi NC7SZ125 from TI. SN74AUP1G125DBVR is the TI AUP-family single bus buffer gate in SOT-23-5 with identical pinout (1=OE, 2=A, 3=GND, 4=Y, 5=VCC). Listed in TI's Little Logic Guide as the cross-reference for the NC7SZ family. Lower-power variant of LVC with 0.8 V to 3.6 V VCC range; compatible at the 1.8 V to 3.3 V operating range where NC7SZ is typically deployed. Recommended when the application is in the 1.8 V core logic domain.
replacementCandidates.productOverview: SN74AUP1G125DBVR is TI's SOT-23-5 single low-power bus buffer gate with 3-state output. AUP family supports 0.8 V to 3.6 V VCC, ~0.9 ns propagation delay at 3.3 V, <1 uA quiescent current. Pin-for-pin drop-in for onsemi NC7SZ125 (SOT-23-5, same pinout 1=OE, 2=A, 3=GND, 4=Y, 5=VCC). Listed in TI's Little Logic Guide as the industry cross-reference for the NC7SZ family. Lower power and lower voltage than NC7SZ; compatible at the 1.8 V to 3.3 V operating range where NC7SZ is typically deployed.
replacementCandidates.reason: Pin-to-pin P2P drop-in for the obsolete onsemi NC7SZ125 from TI. SN74AUP1G125DBVR is the TI AUP-family single bus buffer gate in SOT-23-5 with identical pinout (1=OE, 2=A, 3=GND, 4=Y, 5=VCC). Listed in TI's Little Logic Guide as the cross-reference for the NC7SZ family. Lower-power variant of LVC with 0.8 V to 3.6 V VCC range; compatible at the 1.8 V to 3.3 V operating range where NC7SZ is typically deployed. Recommended when the application is in the 1.8 V core logic domain.

fitNotes: Pin-to-pin P2P drop-in for the obsolete onsemi NC7SZ125 from Nexperia. 74LVC1G125GV is the Nexperia / NXP equivalent in SOT-23-5 with identical pinout (1=OE, 2=A, 3=GND, 4=Y, 5=VCC), 1.65 V to 5.5 V VCC range, and the same CMOS 3-state buffer topology. Industry-standard cross-vendor drop-in for the TinyLogic NC7SZ family. Same 3-state output enable behavior, same quiescent current class.
replacementCandidates.reason: Pin-to-pin P2P drop-in for the obsolete onsemi NC7SZ125 from Nexperia. 74LVC1G125GV is the Nexperia / NXP equivalent in SOT-23-5 with identical pinout (1=OE, 2=A, 3=GND, 4=Y, 5=VCC), 1.65 V to 5.5 V VCC range, and the same CMOS 3-state buffer topology. Industry-standard cross-vendor drop-in for the TinyLogic NC7SZ family. Same 3-state output enable behavior, same quiescent current class.

Product Parameter.Function: Single bus buffer gate with 3-state output

replacementCandidates.description: Single 1.65 V to 5.5 V bus buffer gate with 3-state output, SOT-23-5. Pin-compatible direct P2P replacement for onsemi NC7SZ125.
fitNotes: Pin-to-pin P2P drop-in for the obsolete onsemi NC7SZ125. Same SOT-23-5 footprint, same pinout (1=OE, 2=A, 3=GND, 4=Y, 5=VCC), same 3-state buffer function, similar propagation delay (~2.5 ns at 3.3 V vs ~2.0 ns for NC7SZ125). The SN74LVC1G125 family from TI is the industry-standard cross-vendor alternative and the recommended direct replacement per Z2Data and Ovaga part cross-reference. Operating voltage range is identical (1.65 V to 5.5 V). onsemi has marked NC7SZ125 as 'DISCONTINUED' in the official datasheet (Rev. 4, Page 5).
replacementCandidates.productOverview: SN74LVC1G125DBVR is TI's SOT-23-5 single bus buffer gate with 3-state output (active-low OE). LVC family supports 1.65 V to 5.5 V VCC, ±24 mA output drive, 3.7 ns propagation delay at 3.3 V. Pin-for-pin drop-in for onsemi NC7SZ125 (SOT-23-5 footprint, identical pinout: 1=OE, 2=A, 3=GND, 4=Y, 5=VCC). Industry-standard cross-reference listed on Z2Data and Ovaga for the obsolete onsemi NC7SZ125. Same CMOS topology, same 3-state output, same quiescent current class.
replacementCandidates.reason: Pin-to-pin P2P drop-in for the obsolete onsemi NC7SZ125. Same SOT-23-5 footprint, same pinout (1=OE, 2=A, 3=GND, 4=Y, 5=VCC), same 3-state buffer function, similar propagation delay (~2.5 ns at 3.3 V vs ~2.0 ns for NC7SZ125). The SN74LVC1G125 family from TI is the industry-standard cross-vendor alternative and the recommended direct replacement per Z2Data and Ovaga part cross-reference. Operating voltage range is identical (1.65 V to 5.5 V). onsemi has marked NC7SZ125 as 'DISCONTINUED' in the official datasheet (Rev. 4, Page 5).

target.description: Single UHS buffer gate with 3-state output, TinyLogic UHS series, SOT-23-5. Discontinued by onsemi (2025).
target.productOverview: NC7SZ125 is onsemi's single TinyLogic UHS buffer / line driver with three-state output in SOT-23-5. Fabricated in advanced CMOS, propagation delay ~2.0 ns at 5 V, quiescent current <1 µA. onsemi has marked this family 'DISCONTINUED: These devices are not available' in the official datasheet Rev. 4 (Page 5). For new designs use SN74LVC1G125DBVR (TI) which is the industry-standard pin-compatible drop-in.
